rationale: The proposed change concerns the homestead exemption amount under Tax Code §11.13(b). Gov't Code §2001.041 addresses decentralization of agency services and is wholly unrelated to property tax exemptions.
quote: A state agency rule, order, or guide relating to decentralization of agency services or programs must include a statement of the manner in which the agency complied with Section 391.0091, Local Government Code.
_note: No conflict; the cited rule governs decentralization compliance and has no bearing on homestead exemption amounts.
